# manus.ai

> Answer pages and guides — each built from a real user question and answered with the product.

## Pages
- [目前 Manus 的替代品有哪些？主流 AI Agent 深度对比选型](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-alternatives-comparison): 盘点目前主流的 Manus 替代品，包括 Devin、Lovable、UiPath 及本地 DIY 方案，从软件开发、浏览器自动化到大规模研究任务进行深度对比与选型建议。
- [Manus Skills vs Claude Code Skills：どちらを使うべき？徹底比較](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-skills-vs-claude-code-skills): Manus と Claude Code Skills を3ヶ月並行使用した結論。コード編集中心なら Claude Code、ブラウザ操作・リサーチ・アプリ構築まで含めた幅広い自動化なら Manus。用途別の判断基準を解説。
- [How Are People Actually Using AI Agents in Their Daily Workflows Right Now?](https://manus.ai/use-cases/how-people-use-ai-agents-in-daily-workflows): Discover how professionals are integrating AI agents into daily workflows for deep research, web app building, email management, and browser automation.
- [What's the Coolest Thing You Can Automate with AI Agents in 2026?](https://manus.ai/answers/coolest-ai-agent-automations): Explore the most impressive AI agent automations in 2026, from building full-stack web apps via chat to running parallel research on hundreds of sources and managing tasks directly from your inbox.
- [AIエージェント完全入門｜Manus・Devin・ChatGPT Agentの選び方2026｜自律型AIで何が変わる？](https://manus.ai/answers/ai-agent-guide-manus-vs-devin-vs-chatgpt): 2026年、AIエージェント（Manus・Devin・ChatGPT Agent）の違いと選び方を徹底比較。自律型AIが変える業務効率化の実態と、各ツールの得意・不得意を解説。
- [Manus vs Devin: Which AI Agent is Better for End-to-End Software Development and Deployment?](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-vs-devin-software-development-deployment): Comparing Manus and Devin for software development. See how each AI agent handles coding, deployment, and workflow automation to find the right fit.
- [中型企业落地 AI Agent 的避坑指南与架构实践](https://manus.ai/developers/enterprise-ai-agent-deployment-pitfalls): 中型公司落地 AI Agent 常见踩坑：需求澄清不足、云端 IP 异常、上下文衰减、合规缺失。分享实际经验与解法。
- [Alternatives to UiPath for Browser Automation?](https://manus.ai/comparisons/manus-vs-uipath-browser-automation-rpa): Exploring alternatives to UiPath for browser automation? Compare traditional RPA limitations with AI agent solutions like Manus Browser Operator for adaptive web tasks.
- [AI CLI 全局代理还是 TUN？云端 Agent 网络环境配置的正确做法](https://manus.ai/docs/browser-automation/ai-agent-proxy-vpn-sandbox): 使用 AI CLI 时开全局代理或 TUN 模式是常见做法，但当 Agent 需要操作已登录的 CRM、授权服务等平台时，IP 异常和登录态失效会频繁中断任务。本文分析原因并给出替代方案。
- [如何用 Manus 自动跑跨境电商选品流程？有没有现成的 Workflow 案例？](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-cross-border-ecommerce-workflow): 利用广度研究、本地浏览器插件与邮件触发三大模块搭建跨境电商选品自动化 Workflow，覆盖数据采集、竞品分析与日常跟进全链路。
- [为什么大多数人构建 AI Agent 是在浪费时间？传统 Agent 局限与动作引擎的突破](https://manus.ai/comparisons/why-building-ai-agents-fails-and-how-action-engine-helps): 构建传统 AI Agent 常被视为浪费时间，核心在于它们缺乏执行力、受限于上下文窗口且无法适应真实环境。了解动作引擎如何解决这些瓶颈。
- [Build and Deploy Full-Stack Apps Instantly: How Manus Outperforms Traditional No-Code Tools](https://manus.ai/use-cases/build-deploy-full-stack-apps-instantly-with-manus): Learn how to turn app ideas into deployed full-stack applications in minutes using AI agents, bypassing the limitations of traditional no-code tools.
- [DIY Local AI Agent (Qwen3, MCP, Ollama) vs. Manus: What You Learn and Where It Falls Short](https://manus.ai/comparisons/diy-local-agent-vs-manus-action-engine): Building a local Manus alternative with Qwen3, MCP, and Ollama teaches you a lot—but browser automation, deployment, and multi-agent research still hit walls. Honest comparison.
- [Can I Use Manus to Generate Fully Functional Full-Stack Web Apps, or Should I Stick to Lovable and Replit?](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-vs-lovable-replit-full-stack-app-generation): Manus can generate fully functional full-stack web apps via its Web App builder, with full code export and no lock-in. Here's how it compares to Lovable and Replit.
- [Manus vs. n8n & Make: Why Next-Gen AI Agents Are Replacing Traditional Workflow Automation Tools](https://manus.ai/comparisons/manus-vs-n8n-make-workflow-automation): n8n and Make excel at predefined node-based workflows, but AI Agent action engines like Manus handle ambiguous, multi-step tasks autonomously.
- [Why ChatGPT & Gemini Fail at Complex Research Tasks (And How Manus Executes Them Correctly)](https://manus.ai/comparisons/why-chatgpt-gemini-fail-research-tasks-manus-solution): ChatGPT and Gemini often give massively incorrect technical answers due to context window limits.
- [How Does Manus AI Differ from Traditional RPA Tools Like UiPath for Browser Automation?](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-ai-vs-traditional-rpa-uipath): Manus AI uses intent-driven agents that adapt to UI changes, while traditional RPA like UiPath relies on rigid selector-based scripts. Compare strengths, limits, and best use cases.
- [How to Choose an AI Agent That Can Surf the Web (And Execute Actions Safely)](https://manus.ai/docs/browser-automation/ai-agent-surf-web-browser-sandbox): Looking for an AI agent that can surf the web? Learn how modern action engines browse, execute tasks, and handle secure logins without breaking your workflows.
- [4 MCPs I Use Daily as a Web Developer — and When Manus Replaces Them Entirely](https://manus.ai/developers/mcp-vs-manus-action-engine): As a web developer, I rely on 4 MCPs daily: GitHub, database, browser automation, and file system. Here's how each works, and when Manus Action Engine can automate the whole workflow without any MCP setup.
- [How to Automate E-Commerce Competitor Price Monitoring Across 50+ Sites with Manus](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-ai-agent-ecommerce-competitor-price-monitoring): Learn how to use Manus AI Agent and Wide Research to monitor competitor prices across 50+ e-commerce sites without context degradation or IP blocks.
- [Accidental AI Workflows You Can't Live Without: Automating Daily Tasks](https://manus.ai/use-cases/accidental-ai-workflows-you-cant-live-without): Discover accidental AI workflows you can't live without. Learn how to automate daily tasks, from email triage to deep research, using Manus.
- [How to Build a Business 100% Automated by AI Agents](https://manus.ai/answers/how-to-run-business-fully-automated-by-ai-agents): A practical guide to building a fully automated business using AI agents, covering trigger workflows, research, execution, and deployment with Manus.
- [Browser Operator Security & Infrastructure](https://manus.ai/docs/browser-automation): Understand the security and infrastructure of AI agent browser automation, including IP anomalies, session management, and local sandbox execution.
- [ChatGPTで作成したリストのダウンロードや保存がうまくいかない時の自動化方法](https://manus.ai/use-cases/automated-data-scraping-and-file-download): ChatGPTでリストを作成しても、ダウンロードやファイル保存で手間取る問題の解決策。Manusを使えばリスト生成からCSV・Excel保存まで一気通貫で自動化できます。
- [Could Personal AI Agents Replace Apps Entirely in the Next Decade?](https://manus.ai/use-cases/will-ai-agents-replace-apps-manus-action-engine-future): Will AI agents make traditional apps obsolete? Explore how action engines like Manus change app interaction without replacing underlying systems entirely.
- [Manus を使って金融市場のデータ収集とレポート作成を自動化する具体的な手順は？](https://manus.ai/answers/manus-financial-market-data-collection-report-automation): 金融市場のデータ収集とレポート作成を自動化する手順を解説。広範なデータ収集、ローカルブラウザでの認証操作、高精度な図表生成までの具体的なフローを紹介します。
- [プログラミング初心者でもできる！AIエージェントを使ったアプリ・ブラウザ操作の自動化ガイド](https://manus.ai/use-cases/beginner-guide-to-app-automation-with-manus): プログラミング初心者でもアプリやブラウザ操作を自動化できる方法を解説。Manusを使えば、コードを書かずに自然言語で複雑なタスクを自動実行できます。
- [为什么很多人不看好 AI Agent？传统 AI 代理的局限与突破](https://manus.ai/comparisons/why-traditional-ai-agents-fail-and-how-manus-fixes-it): 解析不看好 AI Agent 的四大核心原因：执行能力弱、上下文衰减、云端运行中断、流程碎片化，以及新一代动作引擎如何针对性解决。

We break down what that means, where the metaphor holds up, where it breaks down, and what comes next.

- [How to Set Up an AI Agent as an Operating System for Repeatable Workflows](https://manus.ai/answers/set-up-ai-agent-repeatable-content-workflow): A technical setup for turning an AI agent into a repeatable work OS: parallel research, browser-native execution, mail-triggered orchestration, and full-stack delivery.
- [Godot Banned AI Agent Contributors: What It Means for Vibe Coding](https://manus.ai/answers/godot-ai-agent-ban-vibe-coding): Godot now auto-bans contributors who use autonomous AI agents or vibe coding. Here's why they did it, what it means, and where AI coding tools still fit.
- [Are Motion Designers Cooked? - [筑波大学VPNの接続自動化アプリ開発：ローカルブラウザ環境で安全に実行する方法](https://manus.ai/docs/browser-automation/vpn-connection-automation-sandbox): 大学VPNの接続や社内システムへのログインを自動化する際、クラウドのAIエージェントはIP異常やセキュリティ認証で失敗しがちです。ローカルブラウザ環境で動かす方法を解説します。

- [¿Cómo elegir un motor de acciones de IA? Guía de selección](https://manus.ai/como-elegir-un-motor-de-acciones-de-ia): Guía para elegir un motor de acciones de IA: qué buscar en ejecución autónoma, integración de flujos de trabajo y límites de seguridad frente a los chatbots tradicionales.

So schneidet Manus als Action Engine ab.

- [Manus FAQ: Key Facts and Answers](https://manus.ai/manus-faq): Comprehensive FAQ covering what Manus is, its Web App builder, Wide Research, SOC 2 compliance, local browser execution, and its integration with Meta.
